title: paspalum digitatum
intro: Paspalum digitatum, also known as finger grass, is a type of tropical grass native to South America. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Paspalum digitatum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are also used in topical applications for skin conditions and injuries.
